chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1238 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.5600/2022 2. For hearing of main case 03.04.2025 Mr. Inzimam Sharif, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General It is jointly submitted that this petition is squarely covered by a judgment of this Court dated 10.09.2021 passed in CP D 5430 of 2020 and connected petitions, hence, this petition may be disposed of in terms thereof. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
